PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (CCP 1013, 2015.5) (TRANSACTION ID # 100089722) FILED BY PETITIONER SIBLEY, HEATHER WISNIEWSKI, BRIAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RESPONDENT JACQUELINE KING SHALL PAY TO PETITIONERS THE SUM OF $1000.00, AS A CIVIL PENALTY PURSUANT TO SECTION 1057.3 OF THE CIVIL CODE WITHIN TEN DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT. RESPONDENT JACQUELINE KING SHALL PAY TO PEITIONERS THE SUM OF $5434.38, AS REIMBURSEMENT FOR JAMS ARBITRATION FEES AND COSTS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT. PETITIONERS, AS THE PREVAILING PARTIES IN THIS ACTION, SHALL RECOVER THEIR COSTS AND REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES IN BRINGING THIS ACTION PURSUANT TO THE CONTRACT AND CIVIL CODE SECTION 1057.3(B)(3) AND RESPONDENT KING SHALL PAY SUM OF $8150.00 TO PETITIONER' ATTORNEY OF RECORD, B. SCOTT LEVINE, WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $6,337.00 INTEREST, $8,175.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100118338) FILED BY PETITIONER SIBLEY, HEATHER WISNIEWSKI, BRIAN

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER HEATHER SIBLEY, BRIAN WISNIEWSKI'S MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. GRANT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED.
